raw_consumer_statement:
Today is Monday, XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, FL XXXX XXXX To Consumer Financial Protection Bureau REFERENCE : Citibank Unfair Business Pracdtices On XX/XX/year>, I requested a balance transfer to pay off higher interest credit card in the amount of {$5000.00}. 

Citi went ahead and put in the charge of {$5000.00} twice on my credit card. 
I have since then talking to Citis customer service in XXXX and XXXX XXXX without any resolve to my situation. My credit score went down XXXX points because of Citis mistake. 

I spoke to XXXX at Citibank Customer Service yesterday who promised that this situation will be resolved before this Friday. 

I need Citibank to rectify their mistake and to restore my credit score to the XXXX points that I lost since their mistake. Please let me know if you need further information in order to help me. Thank you. 

Respectfully, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
